The '''Galactic News Service''' was a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide reporting agency. From its beginnings during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the agency survived both the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], becoming the leading media company during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] reign.

As a youth, [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] worked for the agency as a reporter. While covering the [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop races]] on [[Corsin/Legends|Corsin]], Na'al witnessed first-hand [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cruelty, being imprisoned as the Empire [[Crackdown on Corsin|subjugated]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], replacing the existing government with one controlled by the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. This led Na'al to eventually join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a historian.<ref name="MTS">''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref><ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref><ref name="Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>
